scripts.test:ui: npm run build && node test/run-ui-tests.mjs core
scripts.test:ui:all: npm run build && node test/run-ui-tests.mjs all
scripts.test:ui:smoke: npm run build && node test/run-ui-tests.mjs smoke
scripts.test:ui:shell: npm run build && node test/run-ui-tests.mjs shell
scripts.test:ui:contracts: npm run build && node test/run-ui-tests.mjs contracts
scripts.test:ui:dispatch: npm run build && node test/run-ui-tests.mjs dispatch
scripts.test:ui:staffing: npm run build && node test/run-ui-tests.mjs staffing
scripts.test:ui:aircraft: npm run build && node test/run-ui-tests.mjs aircraft
scripts.test:ui:aircraft:all: npm run build && node test/run-ui-tests.mjs aircraft_extended
scripts.test:ui:watch: npm run build && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run-ui-tests-headed.ps1 core
scripts.test:ui:watch:contracts: npm run build && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run-ui-tests-headed.ps1 contracts
scripts.test:ui:watch:staffing: npm run build && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run-ui-tests-headed.ps1 staffing
scripts.test:ui:watch:aircraft: npm run build && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run-ui-tests-headed.ps1 aircraft
scripts.test:ui:edge: npm run build && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run-ui-tests-via-edge.ps1 core
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:ui
